problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Combining Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
